summary: Cash Payment with Merchant Debit Account feature testing completed - ALL TESTS PASS. Backend APIs and Frontend UI fully functional. Fixed routing bug in admin.py where static route /merchants/debit-overview was placed after parameterized /merchants/{merchant_id} route.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: Route ordering bug - static route defined after parameterized route, causing 404 'Merchant not found' error

seed_data_creation: Cash payment transactions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash Payment with Merchant Debit Account feature is fully functional. All endpoints tested: GET /api/merchants/debit-account, GET /api/merchants/search-customer, POST /api/merchants/cash-transaction, GET /api/admin/merchants/debit-overview, PUT /api/admin/merchants/{merchant_id}/debit-settings. E2E flow verified: Admin sets debit limit -> Merchant searches customer -> Records cash payment -> Customer gets cashback -> Merchant debit account debited. Frontend verified: Merchant Cash tab shows debit account info, Record Cash Payment modal works with customer search, Admin Settings > Merchant Debit tab shows all merchant debit accounts.

backend_apis.description: Merchant can view their debit account balance and limits
Merchant can search for customers by phone number
Merchant records cash payment, customer gets cashback
Merchant can view debit transaction history
Admin can view all merchant debit accounts
Admin can set debit limit for a merchant
Admin can view specific merchant's debit account

frontend_ui.description: Shows debit account overview with balance, limit, usage bar, and action buttons
Search customer by phone, select customer, enter amount (shows cashback calculation), record payment
Shows all debit transactions with amounts and running balance
Shows merchant debit accounts table with balance, limit, usage, status, and configure actions

e2e_flow.test_case: Admin sets debit limit (GHS 1000) -> Merchant searches customer -> Records GHS 35 cash payment -> Customer receives GHS 1.75 cashback (5% rate) -> Merchant debit account debited by GHS 1.75
